headline: Microsoft To Fund Startup That Enhances AI Deployment
summary: Touchcast Inc., a startup focused on caching generative AI queries, is set to raise $100 million from venture backers, including Microsoft Corp. The New York-based company aims to reduce computational and energy requirements for models like OpenAI's GPT-4. CEO Edo Segal expects the new funding to push Touchcast's valuation to at least $350 million.
